description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Manual build binary on MacOS that runs on push to the qt6 branch and allows manual dispatch. In a single macos-13 job, set up Python 3.13 with pip caching, install Qt 6.7.3, numpy, PyQt6, and other required modules, build Veusz extensions, create a binary with pyinstaller, and upload the resulting macOS tarball as an artifact.
